Class Agent

java.lang.Object
evacuation.agent.Agent
All Implemented Interfaces:
Serializable
public class Agent extends Object implements Serializable
Represents an agent moving through the evacuation graph toward an exit.

Agents have psychological states that affect speed and behavior, and movement modes that determine how they choose their next node.

Animation speeds by psychological state:

  • CALM: base speed (0.013 × speed per frame)
  • PANIC: 2.2× base speed
  • MADNESS: 3.2× base speed, random movement, stops at exits
See Also:
  • Serialized Form

    Methods inherited from class Object

    clone, equals, finalize, getClass, hashCode, notify, notifyAll, wait, wait, wait

  • Constructor Details

    • Agent

      public Agent(String id, Node startNode, Node destination, Graph graph, int speed, double densityTolerance, Agent.Behavior behavior, Agent.PsychologicalState psychologicalState, Agent.DestinationMode destinationMode)
      Constructs an Agent with all parameters.
      Parameters:
      id - unique identifier
      startNode - initial position node
      destination - target destination node
      graph - the simulation graph
      speed - movement speed (1–5)
      densityTolerance - how much congestion the agent tolerates (0.0–1.0)
      behavior - movement behavior
      psychologicalState - initial psychological state
      destinationMode - destination selection mode

    • Agent

      public Agent(String id, Node startNode, Node destination, Graph graph)
      Constructs an Agent with default settings (speed=1, tolerance=1.0, YIELD, CALM, FIXED).
      Parameters:
      id - unique identifier
      startNode - initial position
      destination - target destination
      graph - the simulation graph

  • Method Details

    • reset

      public void reset()
      Resets this agent to its initial state, as if the simulation had not started.

    • initialize

      public void initialize()
      Initializes the agent for simulation, computing the initial path. Automatically selects the nearest open exit if no destination is set.

    • move

      public void move()
      Advances the agent's logical state by one simulation tick.

    • animateMovement

      public boolean animateMovement(double animSpeed)
      Updates the visual display position of this agent for smooth animation. Should be called at 60 fps.
      Parameters:
      animSpeed - animation step size per frame
      Returns:
      true if still animating

    • getAnimationSpeed

      public double getAnimationSpeed()
      Returns the animation speed for this agent, based on its psychological state and the current edge's speed modifier.
      Returns:
      animation step size per frame

    • syncDisplayWithNode

      public void syncDisplayWithNode()
      Synchronizes the display position with the current logical node position.

    • recalculatePath

      public void recalculatePath()
      Recalculates the path to the destination. Automatically selects the nearest exit if in FIXED mode.

    • teleportTo

      public void teleportTo(Node node)
      Teleports the agent to the specified node and recalculates its path. If the target node is at capacity, applies a strong congestion wait.
      Parameters:
      node - the node to teleport to

    • inducePanic

      public void inducePanic()
      Induces panic in this agent (without modifying the initial state).

    • induceMadness

      public void induceMadness()
      Induces madness in this agent (without modifying the initial state).

    • returnToDepartureNode

      public void returnToDepartureNode()
      Returns this agent toward its departure node (used when target node is deleted). Induces panic.

    • getId

      public String getId()
      Returns:
      the agent's unique ID

    • getPosition

      public Node getPosition()
      Returns:
      the current position node

    • getDestination

      public Node getDestination()
      Returns:
      the destination node

    • getDepartureNode

      public Node getDepartureNode()
      Returns:
      the departure node for current edge

    • getTargetNode

      public Node getTargetNode()
      Returns:
      the target node being moved toward

    • getSpeed

      public int getSpeed()
      Returns:
      the speed rating

    • getDensityTolerance

      public double getDensityTolerance()
      Returns:
      the density tolerance (0.0–1.0)

    • getBehavior

      public Agent.Behavior getBehavior()
      Returns:
      the current behavior

    • getPsychologicalState

      public Agent.PsychologicalState getPsychologicalState()
      Returns:
      the current psychological state

      public Agent.DestinationMode getDestinationMode()
      Returns:
      the destination selection mode

    • getMovementState

      public Agent.MovementState getMovementState()
      Returns:
      the movement state

    • getPath

      public List<Node> getPath()
      Returns:
      the computed path

    • getDisplayX

      public double getDisplayX()
      Returns:
      the current display X position

    • getDisplayY

      public double getDisplayY()
      Returns:
      the current display Y position

    • getEdgeProgress

      public double getEdgeProgress()
      Returns:
      the edge traversal progress (0.0–1.0)

    • getArrivalBehavior

      public Agent.ArrivalBehavior getArrivalBehavior()
      Returns:
      the arrival behavior

    • isMarkedForDeletion

      public boolean isMarkedForDeletion()
      Returns:
      whether this agent is marked for deletion

    • getAgentsPassed

      public int getAgentsPassed()
      Returns:
      the number of node transitions this agent has made

    • setSpeed

      public void setSpeed(int v)
      Parameters:
      v - new speed value (minimum 1)

    • setDensityTolerance

      public void setDensityTolerance(double t)
      Parameters:
      t - new density tolerance (0.0–1.0)

    • setBehavior

      public void setBehavior(Agent.Behavior c)
      Parameters:
      c - new behavior

    • setDestinationMode

      public void setDestinationMode(Agent.DestinationMode m)
      Parameters:
      m - new destination mode

    • setDestination

      public void setDestination(Node d)
      Parameters:
      d - new destination node

    • setOtherAgents

      public void setOtherAgents(List<Agent> a)
      Parameters:
      a - list of other agents in the simulation

    • setMovementState

      public void setMovementState(Agent.MovementState e)
      Parameters:
      e - new movement state

    • setArrivalBehavior

      public void setArrivalBehavior(Agent.ArrivalBehavior ab)
      Parameters:
      ab - new arrival behavior

    • setPsychologicalState

      public void setPsychologicalState(Agent.PsychologicalState state)
      Sets the psychological state and resets auto-panic tracking.
      Parameters:
      state - the new psychological state
